summary: Comprehensive testing of BlackieFi 3.0 finance management app. All 42 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend UI tests pass including navigation, CRUD operations, mobile responsive design, and registration/onboarding flow. Fixed 1 bug: MongoDB _id serialization issue in calendar event creation.

fixed.issue: MongoDB _id ObjectId not JSON serializable - causing 500 error
fixed.fix: Added doc.pop('_id', None) before returning response

issues: 403 error overlay briefly appears when app tries to fetch data after token cleared - cosmetic only, logout works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Calendar event creation was missing _id exclusion after MongoDB insert - fixed
All other endpoints properly exclude _id using projection {'_id': 0}

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all navigation, CRUD, mobile, auth flows working)

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple TEST_ prefixed items created during testing

seed_data_creation: Demo user with income, expenses, debts, accounts, investments, savings, budget seeded on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully functional. Backend seeds demo data on startup. Entity_id is automatically added by API interceptor from localStorage. Calendar auto-generates events from recurring income/expenses/debts. RBAC enforced server-side. Dark navy/amber theme throughout.

auth.register: PASS - new user registration with onboarding wizard

dashboard.unified_view: PASS - shows net worth, balance, debt, investments
